Localization.Description: Starting the SharpEventPersist utility to gain persistence in a system is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} started the utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host} to gain persistence in the system

A suspicious key "{object.fullpath}" was created on host {event_src.host} in the system registry, which indicates a possible attempt to gain persistence in the system using the SharpEventPersist utility
